title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 03 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 03 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 03 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/01/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.41% today, the main contract closed 851.5.The traders' willingness to shipis general.The steel mills are wait and see.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.PBF at Shandong port deal 825-846 yuan/mt,decrease 1-20 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 847-855 yuan/mt,decrease 2-13 yuan/mt. Last week, SMM's global iron ore shipments totaled 33.15 million tons, down 2.1% month on month. Among them, 14.68 million tons were shipped from Australia to China, down 6.4% month on month; Brazil sent 4.08 million tons to China, up 4.1% month on month.
